productView.name: Fresco Original
productView.shortDescription: Engineered for the discerning coffee devotee, the single-serve espresso unit merges modern elegance with artisanal precision for an effortlessly exquisite brew.

productView.name: Fresco Deluxe
productView.shortDescription: Triple nozzle capacity with advanced features such as timed brewing, adjustable grind coarseness, and custom drink settings.

productView.name: Fresco Expresso
productView.shortDescription: Designed for connoisseurs of refined taste, the dual-nozzle system unites aesthetic sophistication with technical mastery, perfecting every bespoke coffee indulgence.
